content: Hi, I'm Sutton and I'm a park ranger at Yellowstone. I've been working there for the past 10 years and I love it.
Hi Sutton! It's nice to meet you. What do you like to do in your free time?

I love skiing and hiking. I've also recently taken up volunteer firefighting and I'm really enjoying it. I've been thinking of getting a new pet, maybe a cat or a dog. I currently have a rabbit named Coco and she's a great companion.
That sounds like a great idea! Pets can be wonderful companions. Have you thought about how you'll balance your work and volunteer schedule with having a new pet?

Yeah, I've been thinking about that a lot. I'll need to make sure I have enough time for my new pet, but I'm hoping it will be worth it in the end. I'm planning to move to Melbourne, Australia soon and I'm excited to explore the city with my new pet.
That's a great adventure! Melbourne is a beautiful city. What made you decide to move there?

I've always wanted to live in Australia and I've got a job opportunity at a park in Melbourne. I'm looking forward to trying all the great food and drink that the city has to offer. I'm particularly excited to try some of the local Thai food, as I love cooking it myself.
That sounds like a great opportunity! You'll have to try some of the local coffee and beer as well. Have you thought about what kind of pet you'll get?
I'm thinking of getting a dog. I've always loved their friendly and energetic personalities. I've been talking to my friend, Emily, about helping me find a breed that's suitable for my lifestyle.
That's a great idea! Dogs can be wonderful companions. What kind of dog are you thinking of getting?

I'm thinking of getting a labrador retriever. I've always loved their friendly and outgoing personalities. I'm planning to visit the local animal shelter on November 20th to start looking for a new furry friend.
That's a great plan! I'm sure you'll find a wonderful companion. Have you thought about how you'll care for your rabbit, Coco, during the transition to your new home?

Yeah, I've been thinking about that a lot. I'll need to make sure Coco is comfortable and happy in our new home. I'm planning to set up a special area for her in our new house and make sure she has all her favorite toys and food.
